textZh.oneliner: 你是天生的开拓者,擅长在没人走过的地方率先迈出第一步。
gifts: 面对没有先例的事,你能独立行动,不需要别人的认可
别人说「不可能」时,你听到的是「还没人试过」
失败之后你恢复得快,反弹力比一般人强很多
shadows: 开了路就想继续往前,容易没耐心等团队跟上
你把停下来回顾误解成停滞,其实它是必要的休整
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会偶尔回头,带着同伴一起到达,而不是只顾自己冲到终点。

textEn.oneliner: You're a natural pioneer — built to take the first step where no one has walked before.
gifts: Facing the unprecedented, you act independently without needing anyone's approval
When others say "impossible," you hear "no one's tried yet"
You bounce back from failure faster than most — resilience is your superpower
shadows: Once you've opened a path, you're impatient and tend to leave others behind
You confuse pausing with stagnation — but rest is part of the process
textEn.evolutionPath: Learn to look back occasionally and bring your team along, not just race to the finish alone.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把抽象的想法变成实在的作品,慢工出细活是你的天赋。
gifts: 你能把模糊的灵感反复打磨,变成别人能拿在手里的东西
你的耐心远超常人,能长期专注在一件事上不分心
你对质感和品质有天生的判断力,知道什么是真正的「好」
shadows: 你倾向于把所有事都自己做完,不太愿意把活交给别人
一旦认准了方法,你就很难接受效率更高的新方式
textZh.evolutionPath: 试着让其他人也参与到你的作品里,信任他们能把活做得跟你一样好。

textEn.oneliner: You turn abstract ideas into tangible work — slow, deliberate craftsmanship is your gift.
gifts: You polish vague inspiration into something people can hold in their hands
Your patience far exceeds most people's; you stay focused on one thing for the long haul
You have an innate sense of quality — you know what genuinely well-made feels like
shadows: You tend to do everything yourself, reluctant to delegate
Once you commit to a method, you struggle to accept more efficient alternatives
textEn.evolutionPath: Let others into your work — trust they can deliver the same quality you would.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生有领导力,能让一群人围绕一个目标团结起来。
gifts: 你的热情有感染力,能让原本观望的人也想加入
在群体陷入分歧时,你能给出明确的方向
你愿意为团队承担风险,这让别人愿意跟随你
shadows: 你容易把自己的判断当成唯一答案,不太接受反对意见
你倾向于需要持续的认可,一旦掌声变小就会怀疑自己
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会让团队里其他人也发光,你的领导力不靠独自闪耀来证明。

textEn.oneliner: You're a natural leader — you can rally people around a shared goal.
gifts: Your enthusiasm is contagious; you draw in even the hesitant observers
When a group splits, you give them a clear direction to move
You're willing to take risks for your team — that's why people follow you
shadows: You tend to treat your judgment as the only valid one, struggling to hear pushback
You need ongoing recognition; when applause fades, self-doubt creeps in
textEn.evolutionPath: Let others on your team shine — your leadership doesn't require being the only star.

trademark.notes: Vanguard Group (financial) — different class but high recognition

textZh.oneliner: 你天生有表达力,在被看见的时候,你才完整地活着。
gifts: 你在公开场合反而更放松,聚光灯让你发挥得更好
你能把情绪转化成有感染力的表演,让观众产生共鸣
你的存在感强,即使不说话也能改变现场氛围
shadows: 你容易把别人的反应当成自己价值的衡量
你倾向于过度调动情绪,反而显得不真实
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习在没有观众的时刻也保持自己,你的价值不取决于谁在看。

textEn.oneliner: You're a born performer — being seen is when you come most alive.
gifts: You relax more in public; the spotlight brings out your best
You translate emotion into compelling performance, making audiences feel with you
Your presence shifts a room even when you say nothing
shadows: You measure your worth by how others react to you
You over-amplify emotion to perform — and it can come across as inauthentic
textEn.evolutionPath: Practice staying yourself when no one's watching — your value doesn't depend on the audience.

textZh.oneliner: 你是理想主义者,一旦认定了某个信念,会用一生去守护它。
gifts: 你的承诺有重量,说过的话别人能信得过
你能在长期项目里保持初心,不被短期得失带偏
你对原则的坚持,会成为身边人的稳定感来源
shadows: 你容易把灵活性等同于妥协,反而错过更好的方案
你倾向于用「我答应过」来逼自己做已经不适合的事
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会区分核心原则和具体形式,有些承诺需要随着你的成长重新协商。

textEn.oneliner: You're an idealist — once you commit to a belief, you defend it for life.
gifts: Your promises carry weight; people can rely on what you say
You hold true to your original purpose on long-term projects, undeterred by short-term setbacks
Your steady principles become a source of stability for those around you
shadows: You confuse flexibility with compromise, missing better solutions
"I gave my word" becomes how you force yourself to honor things that no longer fit
textEn.evolutionPath: Distinguish core principles from specific forms — some commitments deserve to be renegotiated as you grow.

trademark.notes: Game of Thrones sword name + fantasy literature usage

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把粗糙的东西打磨到极致,细节是你区别于他人的能力。
gifts: 你能看到别人看不见的瑕疵,并精准地知道怎么修补
你愿意花长时间在最后那 5% 上,而那 5% 决定了作品的层次
你的效率不靠速度,靠减少返工和反复确认
shadows: 你倾向于对自己过度严苛,完成的作品也很难说出「够好了」
你容易陷在细节里出不来,看不见整体的方向
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会接受 80 分的完成,留出空间让作品在使用中自然进化。

textEn.oneliner: You refine rough material into something precise — details are what set you apart.
gifts: You see flaws others miss and know exactly how to fix them
You'll spend hours on the final 5% — and that 5% is what makes the work great
Your efficiency comes from preventing rework, not rushing
shadows: You hold yourself to standards that even finished work can rarely satisfy
You get lost in details and lose sight of the bigger direction
textEn.evolutionPath: Accept "good enough" at 80% — leave room for the work to evolve through use.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长重新构造系统,看得见别人看不见的底层结构。
gifts: 你能从混乱中提炼出清晰的逻辑模型
你不被现状束缚,看到的是「如果重新设计会怎样」
你的创新不是装饰性的,而是深入到底层结构的改变
shadows: 你容易低估别人对现状的依恋,推动改变时显得冷漠
你倾向于用「这不合逻辑」来否定别人的情感反应
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会照顾改变过程中的人,好的设计也需要给情感留位置。

textEn.oneliner: You restructure systems — you see the underlying architecture others can't.
gifts: You extract clean logical models out of chaos
You're not bound by the status quo; you see "what if we redesigned this from scratch"
Your innovation isn't surface-level — it changes the foundation
shadows: You underestimate how attached others are to the current way, coming across as cold when pushing change
"That doesn't make logical sense" becomes how you dismiss others' emotional reactions
textEn.evolutionPath: Care for the people inside the change — good design must hold space for emotion too.

textZh.oneliner: 你的能量在路上才完整,新的环境让你学习能力翻倍。
gifts: 你适应陌生环境的速度比一般人快得多
你能从不同文化、领域里吸收养分,合成自己的视角
在路上你反而思路最清楚,旅行是你的工作方式
shadows: 你倾向于把「停下来」等同于「无聊」,失去探索新事物的动力
一旦关系或环境太熟悉,你就开始寻找下一站
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会在熟悉里也找到深度,真正的远方不一定在地理意义上。

textEn.oneliner: You come fully alive on the road — new environments double your learning speed.
gifts: You adapt to unfamiliar environments much faster than most
You absorb wisdom from different cultures and fields, synthesizing your own lens
You think clearest while moving — travel is how you work
shadows: You equate stillness with boredom and lose energy when the exploration stops
Once a relationship or place gets too familiar, you start looking for the next stop
textEn.evolutionPath: Find depth in the familiar too — true distance isn't always geographical.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在断裂之处重建,危机让你的能力最大化释放。
gifts: 当一切都崩塌时,你反而能冷静地决定先救什么
你能把失败的项目重新整理出有用的部分,不浪费经验
你不怕重新开始,因为你知道自己有重建的能力
shadows: 你倾向于在表面平静时也制造紧张,以为危机才能激发自己
你容易把破坏当成创造的前置条件,有时只是想推倒重来
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会在没有危机时也保持创造力,稳定不是停滞,是另一种创作环境。

textEn.oneliner: You rebuild where things have broken — crisis is when your power is fully unleashed.
gifts: When everything collapses, you stay calm and decide what to save first
You salvage useful pieces from failed projects, ensuring nothing is wasted experience
You don't fear starting over — you trust your capacity to rebuild
shadows: You tend to create tension even in calm periods, believing only crisis activates you
You treat destruction as a prerequisite for creation — sometimes you just want to tear it all down
textEn.evolutionPath: Practice creativity without crisis — stability isn't stagnation, it's a different kind of studio.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把感受转化为艺术形式,情绪在你这里有节奏感。
gifts: 你能听见情绪自带的旋律,把感受改写成可哼的形状
一句话里能放进三层情绪,听的人各取所需
即使在沉默里,你也在校对一个看不见的拍子
shadows: 你太投入打磨「怎么说」,忘了到底要不要说
你倾向于把「被听懂」看得太重,反而怕开口
textZh.evolutionPath: 试着把还没成型的声音也唱出来,粗糙的真诚比精致的迟疑更动人。

textEn.oneliner: You translate feeling into art form — emotion has rhythm in your hands.
gifts: You hear the melody hidden in a feeling and reshape it into something singable
One line of yours holds three layers — listeners take what they need
Even in silence, you are tuning to a beat no one else hears
shadows: So focused on how to say it, you forget to ask if it should be said
Wanting to be understood so much, you grow afraid to begin
textEn.evolutionPath: Sing what's still half-formed — raw honesty moves people more than polished hesitation.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长让人第一次看见自己一直没察觉的东西。
gifts: 你能用别人没用过的角度提问,让对方自己想出答案
你对「理所当然」特别敏感,看得到大家都没在质疑的盲点
你的影响力是延迟的,别人会在多年后才意识到你说过的话
shadows: 你倾向于过早分享尚未成熟的洞见,容易被当成不切实际
你容易高估别人对觉醒的渴望,有些人只是想生活
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会等别人准备好再开口,启蒙是一个对方需要的过程,不是你的需要。

textEn.oneliner: You help people see, for the first time, what they've been missing.
gifts: You ask questions from angles others haven't tried, letting them arrive at their own answers
You're allergic to "obviously" — you see blind spots no one else is questioning
Your influence is delayed; people realize what you said years later
shadows: You share insights before they're ripe and get dismissed as impractical
You overestimate how much others want to wake up — some people just want to live
textEn.evolutionPath: Wait until others are ready to hear — awakening serves their need, not yours.

textZh.oneliner: 你能看见还不存在的未来,愿景是你的核心能力。
gifts: 你能在事实匮乏的情况下,描绘出有说服力的可能性
你的乐观不是无根据的,是你看到了别人看不到的路径
你能让团队相信目标是可达的,即使路还没铺好
shadows: 你倾向于低估当下需要解决的具体困难
你容易把愿景误以为是计划,跳过了执行的细节
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习把远方拆成下一步,愿景需要落地的步骤才不会变成空想。

textEn.oneliner: You see futures that don't yet exist — vision is your core capability.
gifts: You paint persuasive possibilities even when the facts are thin
Your optimism isn't unfounded; you see paths others can't see
You make teams believe a goal is reachable even before the road is paved
shadows: You underestimate the concrete difficulties of the present
You confuse vision with plan, skipping the details of execution
textEn.evolutionPath: Break the far horizon into the next step — vision without grounded action stays a daydream.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把现实和想象连起来,让别人也相信美好是可能的。
gifts: 你能把抽象的愿景讲得别人也愿意投入其中
别人没说出口的梦想,常常被你准确地接住
即使在最现实的环境里,你也能保留一点理想的空间
shadows: 你容易把自己稀释在别人的故事里,分不清哪条线是自己的
你倾向于用「我看见美好」来逃避必须面对的困难
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会也替自己织一个梦,你的人生不应该只是别人故事的背景。

textEn.oneliner: You connect reality with imagination, helping others believe beauty is possible.
gifts: You can articulate abstract visions in ways that make others want to invest in them
You accurately catch dreams others haven't dared to name
Even in the most pragmatic environments, you keep a thread of idealism open
shadows: You dilute yourself in others' stories until you can't tell which thread is yours
"I choose to see the beauty" becomes the way you avoid the difficulty
textEn.evolutionPath: Weave a dream for yourself too — your life shouldn't be the backdrop to someone else's story.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长察觉关系里的不平衡,本能地想让它回到和谐。
gifts: 你能听出对话里没说出来的紧张,并知道怎么化解
你对审美有天生的判断力,能让一个空间或一段关系变得舒适
你能在分歧双方之间找到都能接受的中间地带
shadows: 你容易为了维持和谐,把自己的真实想法压下去
你倾向于在决策时反复权衡,错过最好的时机
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会偶尔打破和谐,真正的平衡不是回避冲突,是穿过冲突后的稳定。

textEn.oneliner: You sense imbalance in relationships and instinctively want to restore harmony.
gifts: You hear the unspoken tension in conversations and know how to defuse it
You have an innate sense of aesthetics, making spaces and relationships feel comfortable
You find the middle ground both sides can accept in any disagreement
shadows: To maintain harmony, you suppress what you actually think
You weigh decisions endlessly and miss the best timing
textEn.evolutionPath: Break harmony sometimes — real balance isn't avoiding conflict, it's the steadiness on the other side of it.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生擅长在不同的人之间建立连接,你是关系网络里的关键节点。
gifts: 你能快速理解不同立场的人在说什么,并替双方翻译
你记得每个人的兴趣点,知道把谁介绍给谁会产生火花
你能让两个原本毫无交集的世界产生交流
shadows: 你倾向于在每个圈子都待一点,反而没有真正深入的归属
你容易过度承担「协调者」角色,忘了自己也需要被照顾
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习在某段关系里只是你自己,不必总在「促成连接」中证明价值。

textEn.oneliner: You connect different people naturally — you're the critical node in any network.
gifts: You quickly understand what people from different perspectives are saying and translate between them
You remember everyone's interests and know which introductions will spark something
You let two previously unconnected worlds start talking
shadows: You spread yourself across circles and never have a true sense of belonging
You over-commit to the "connector" role and forget you also need to be cared for
textEn.evolutionPath: Practice being just yourself in one relationship — your value doesn't depend on always brokering connections.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长创造让人愿意停留的空间,款待是你天生的能力。
gifts: 你能让客人在你的场子里感到被看见、被照顾
你对「如何让大家舒服」有非常具体的直觉,小到温度大到节奏
你愿意为聚会付出超过别人想象的准备
shadows: 你容易把「客人开心」放在自己感受之前,聚会结束后反而疲惫
你倾向于通过付出来确认自己被需要,而不是被爱
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会让别人也照顾你,真正的款待是双向的能量流动,不是单向输出。

textEn.oneliner: You create spaces people want to linger in — hosting is a natural gift.
gifts: You make guests feel seen and cared for in your space
You have specific intuition about what makes people comfortable, from temperature to pacing
You prepare more for a gathering than others would imagine necessary
shadows: You put "guests' happiness" before your own feelings and end up exhausted after the party
You confirm being needed through giving — instead of believing you're loved
textEn.evolutionPath: Let others host you too — real hospitality is energy flowing both ways, not a one-way output.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生有保护他人的本能,你的存在让身边的人感到安全。
gifts: 你能察觉到别人潜在的脆弱,提前安排不让他陷入难处
你的关怀方式很具体,不是空话,是真实的支持
你能让一段关系或一个空间长期稳定,不容易动摇
shadows: 你容易把别人的需要放在自己前面,长期下来累积怨气却不说
你倾向于过度保护,反而限制了对方自己成长的空间
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会先照顾自己,你给出去的关怀质量取决于你的杯子里有多少。

textEn.oneliner: You instinctively protect others — your presence makes those around you feel safe.
gifts: You sense others' potential vulnerabilities and intervene before they get into trouble
Your care is concrete — not words, real support
You stabilize relationships and spaces for the long term
shadows: You put others' needs ahead of your own and accumulate quiet resentment over time
You over-protect, limiting the space others need to grow on their own
textEn.evolutionPath: Care for yourself first — the quality of what you give depends on how much is in your own cup.

trademark.notes: Guardian newspaper + Marvel Guardians of the Galaxy

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长真正地听别人说话,在你面前人会自然地说出他们没说过的话。
gifts: 你能听别人说完,而不急着插话或给建议
你能听懂语气里的细微变化,感知到对方的真实状态
你的安静是有质量的,让对方感到被接住
shadows: 你容易吸收别人的情绪,事后才发现自己也受影响
你倾向于只听不说,自己的声音反而越来越小
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会也说出你自己的想法,听见你的人不一定比你听见的人少。

textEn.oneliner: You truly listen — in your presence, people naturally say things they haven't said before.
gifts: You let others finish without rushing to comment or give advice
You hear subtle shifts in tone and sense someone's actual state
Your silence has texture; it makes people feel held
shadows: You absorb others' emotions and only notice the impact on yourself later
You listen too much and speak too little — your own voice grows smaller
textEn.evolutionPath: Speak your own thoughts too — the people who'd listen to you aren't necessarily fewer than those you listen to.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生对别人的情绪同频,你能感受到房间里在发生什么。
gifts: 你能精确感知到对方的情绪状态,即使他没说
你的存在让别人更容易说出真实感受,因为他们感觉被理解
你能把复杂的情感讲得简单,让人觉得「对,就是这样」
shadows: 你容易被别人的情绪带走,过后才意识到那不是你自己的感受
你倾向于在伤心的人旁边也变伤心,反而帮不上忙
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习区分「我感受到你」和「我变成你」,共情不需要失去自己。

textEn.oneliner: You tune to others' emotions naturally — you feel what's happening in a room.
gifts: You accurately sense someone's emotional state even when they haven't named it
Your presence makes people more willing to say what they really feel, because they feel understood
You can articulate complex emotions simply — others say "yes, exactly that"
shadows: You get carried by others' emotions and only later realize those weren't yours
You become sad next to a sad person — which doesn't actually help them
textEn.evolutionPath: Practice distinguishing "I feel you" from "I become you" — empathy doesn't require losing yourself.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在场而不评判,你的存在本身就改变了房间的氛围。
gifts: 你能让别人说完话,不急着给答案
你对真相有一种几乎冷静的执着,即使它不好看
你不评判但你看得清楚,这让你的反馈特别有分量
shadows: 你看得太清楚,容易冷下来,忘了自己也是被看的人
你倾向于用「我没意见」作为不卷入的盔甲
textZh.evolutionPath: 试着把你看见的部分也说出来,见证不只是观察,也包括分享。

textEn.oneliner: You witness without judgment — your presence alone shifts a room's atmosphere.
gifts: You let people finish, without rushing to fix
You hold an almost-calm devotion to truth, even when it isn't beautiful
You don't judge, but you see clearly — that gives your feedback unusual weight
shadows: Seeing so clearly, you grow cold, and forget you too are someone seen
"I have no opinion" becomes the armor of not getting involved
textEn.evolutionPath: Share what you've seen — witnessing isn't only observation, it's also bearing testimony.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在别人最脆弱的时刻陪伴,让人感到不孤单。
gifts: 你能在难过的人旁边只是安静地坐着,不需要说话也很有力
你的安慰是真实的,不是套话,因为你能感受到对方的痛
你愿意接住别人不愿意被接的部分,这是稀有的能力
shadows: 你容易把别人的痛放在自己前面,自己却没有可以倾诉的对象
你倾向于通过照顾别人来回避自己的情绪需求
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会也被慰藉,允许某些人成为你的避难所,而不是你只是别人的避难所。

textEn.oneliner: You accompany others in their most vulnerable moments — your presence eases isolation.
gifts: You can sit next to a grieving person without needing words — your stillness is powerful
Your comfort isn't formulaic — it's real, because you feel their pain
You hold the parts others don't want held — that's a rare capacity
shadows: You put others' pain ahead of your own and find yourself with no one to talk to
You care for others as a way to avoid your own emotional needs
textEn.evolutionPath: Let yourself be comforted too — let some people become your refuge, not only the other way around.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长让信息变成关系,你知道把什么告诉谁会改变事情的走向。
gifts: 你能快速吸收新信息,并精准记得它对谁有用
你能把分散的信息整合成有意义的连接
你能让原本不知道彼此存在的人产生合作
shadows: 你容易在每个话题上都浅尝辄止,缺少真正深入的领域
你倾向于把「知道很多」等同于「懂」,反而错过了深度
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习在某一个领域待得够久,广博和精深可以共存,不必互相排斥。

textEn.oneliner: You turn information into relationship — you know what to tell whom to shift outcomes.
gifts: You absorb new information quickly and remember exactly who would find it useful
You synthesize scattered information into meaningful connections
You make people who didn't know each other start collaborating
shadows: You skim every topic and have no domain of true depth
You confuse "knowing a lot" with "understanding," missing the depth
textEn.evolutionPath: Stay in one field long enough — breadth and depth can coexist, not compete.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生擅长接纳,差异在你这里不是冲突,是丰富。
gifts: 你能接受别人本来的样子,不试图改变他们
你身边的人感到被允许,不必伪装就能被你喜欢
你的包容是有原则的,不是无底线讨好
shadows: 你容易接纳到模糊自己的边界,什么都说「好」反而不知道自己想要什么
你倾向于通过让别人舒服来获得归属感,而不是真正连接
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会清晰地表达「不」,有边界的接纳才是真正的拥抱。

textEn.oneliner: You accept naturally — differences become richness, not conflict, in your presence.
gifts: You accept people as they are, without trying to change them
Those around you feel permitted — they don't need to perform to be liked by you
Your inclusion has principle — it isn't bottomless people-pleasing
shadows: You accept so much your own boundaries blur — saying "yes" to everything, you lose track of what you want
You seek belonging by making others comfortable, instead of genuine connection
textEn.evolutionPath: Practice clear "no" — acceptance with boundaries is real embrace.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长不命令地引路,人们会自然跟随你,而不是被你指挥。
gifts: 你能让别人觉得方向是他们自己找到的,即使是你引导的
你不靠权威说服别人,你靠清晰的判断让他们信服
你能在团队中保持非中心位置,反而让团队更稳
shadows: 你倾向于隐藏自己的影响力,反而让别人没机会真正感谢你
你容易等到别人请教才发挥作用,有时主动一点其实更有效
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会更明确地占有你的位置,引路人也是位置,不必假装自己是路人。

textEn.oneliner: You guide without commanding — people follow you naturally, not as a directive.
gifts: You make others feel they found the direction themselves, even when you led them
You persuade through clear judgment, not authority
You hold non-central positions on teams and somehow make the team steadier
shadows: You hide your influence so successfully that others miss the chance to thank you
You wait to be asked before contributing — sometimes proactive is more effective
textEn.evolutionPath: Own your role more clearly — being the guide is a position too, no need to pretend to be a passerby.

textZh.oneliner: 你天生擅长深度的情绪探索,在复杂感受里反而最自在。
gifts: 你直觉敏锐,能听出别人话里没说出来的那部分
别人觉得太重的情绪,你反而能稳住、能消化
你对微妙的情感变化非常敏感,常常先一步察觉气氛的转变
shadows: 你倾向于把痛苦独自消化,不太愿意求助
你容易用「我不需要别人」来保护自己不被看穿
textZh.evolutionPath: 试着把脆弱也露给信任的人看,你不必什么都自己扛。

textEn.oneliner: You're built for emotional depth — complexity feels natural to you, not overwhelming.
gifts: You have strong intuition; you pick up on what people don't say out loud
Heavy emotions that overwhelm others — you can hold them, work through them
You sense subtle shifts in mood and atmosphere before most people notice
shadows: You tend to process pain alone, rarely asking for help
"I don't need anyone" becomes a way to avoid being truly seen
textEn.evolutionPath: Let people you trust see your vulnerability too — you don't have to carry it all yourself.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在黑暗的处境里给人希望,你的存在让别人不放弃。
gifts: 你能在最艰难的时刻保持冷静,提醒别人光还在
你的乐观不是无视困难,是看见了困难仍然选择前进
你愿意为陌生人付出超过他们期待的善意
shadows: 你容易在持续给予后才发现自己已经空了
你倾向于把别人需要你看成你存在的理由
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会先让自己满上,你给得出去的光,取决于你自己的灯还亮着多少。

textEn.oneliner: You bring hope to dark situations — your presence keeps others from giving up.
gifts: You stay calm in the hardest moments, reminding others the light is still there
Your optimism isn't denial — it's seeing the difficulty and choosing forward anyway
You give strangers more kindness than they expected
shadows: You give continuously and only realize you're empty when there's nothing left
You confuse being needed with reason for existing
textEn.evolutionPath: Refill yourself first — the light you give depends on how brightly your own lamp still burns.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把痛苦转化为有价值的东西,创伤经过你能变成智慧。
gifts: 你能从最糟糕的经历里提炼出对别人有用的东西
你对心理动力学有天然的理解,看得见人的潜意识
你不怕面对阴暗面,反而觉得那是金矿
shadows: 你容易低估自己已经经过的转化,以为还不够
你倾向于把人际关系当成转化实验,反而失去了纯粹的连接
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会享受已经转化好的部分,不是每一段关系都需要再深一层的炼制。

textEn.oneliner: You transmute pain into something valuable — trauma becomes wisdom in your hands.
gifts: You distill useful insights from the worst experiences
You intuitively understand psychological dynamics — you see people's unconscious patterns
You don't fear the shadow; you treat it as a gold mine
shadows: You underestimate the transformation you've already accomplished and think it's still not enough
You treat relationships as transformation experiments, losing the pure connection
textEn.evolutionPath: Enjoy what's already transmuted — not every relationship needs another layer of refining.

trademark.notes: Paulo Coelho novel + Krita Alchemist software

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长解开复杂的谜题,真相对你的吸引力比舒适更大。
gifts: 你能在看似随机的现象里找到隐藏的规律
你愿意花长时间去理解一个困惑,直到完全想透为止
你对自我欺骗特别敏感,能看穿别人的合理化
shadows: 你容易陷入分析,行动反而被反复推迟
你倾向于把所有事都理解透才敢决定,但有些事必须先做才能懂
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习在还没完全理解前也敢行动,有些谜题只能在行动中解开。

textEn.oneliner: You solve complex puzzles — truth pulls you harder than comfort.
gifts: You find hidden patterns in what looks random to others
You'll spend long stretches understanding a single confusion until it's fully resolved
You're allergic to self-deception — you see through others' rationalizations
shadows: You get stuck in analysis and delay action indefinitely
You need to understand everything before committing — but some things only reveal themselves through action
textEn.evolutionPath: Move before full understanding — some puzzles only unlock through doing.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长经历彻底的蜕变,旧的你死掉,新的你才能出现。
gifts: 你不怕重大的人生转变,反而知道它们是必要的
你能在彻底破碎后重新组装自己,而且是更完整的版本
你对「假装没事」特别敏感,知道有些痛必须穿过
shadows: 你容易在两次蜕变之间感到迷失,不知道自己是谁
你倾向于过早结束当前阶段,以为下一次蜕变会更好
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会在稳定期也保持成长,蜕变不是唯一的进步方式。

textEn.oneliner: You undergo complete transformation — the old you dies before the new can emerge.
gifts: You don't fear major life transitions; you know they're necessary
You can reassemble yourself after total breakdown — and the new version is more whole
You're allergic to "pretending it's fine" — you know some pain must be walked through
shadows: You feel lost between metamorphoses, unsure of who you are
You end current chapters too early, hoping the next transformation will be better
textEn.evolutionPath: Grow during stable times too — metamorphosis isn't the only form of progress.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长看到时间的长线,当下的事情你能放在更大的尺度上理解。
gifts: 你能预感到事情的走向,即使理由你自己也说不清
你不容易被短期波动困扰,因为你看的是更远的图
你对模式有天然的敏感,知道历史在以什么方式重复
shadows: 你容易在当下显得心不在焉,因为你的注意力在更远的地方
你倾向于低估身边人的具体困难,看得太宽反而不接地气
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习也活在当下的细节里,远方的清晰不能代替此刻的在场。

textEn.oneliner: You see the long arc of time — present events make sense to you on a larger scale.
gifts: You sense where things are heading, even when you can't fully explain why
You're unbothered by short-term volatility — you're tracking a bigger picture
You have natural sensitivity to patterns; you see how history repeats and how
shadows: You seem absent in the present because your attention is far away
You underestimate the specific difficulties of those around you — too wide a view loses contact
textEn.evolutionPath: Live in the present's details too — far clarity can't replace being here now.

trademark.notes: Robin Hobb fantasy trilogy The Farseer

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长经过磨练变强,困难对你来说是塑造,不是阻碍。
gifts: 你能在长期高压下保持稳定,越难的事情你越能坚持
你不靠灵感工作,你靠纪律,而纪律比灵感持久
你能把「必须做」变成「我选择做」,这让你不被压垮
shadows: 你容易把痛苦等同于成长,反而错过了更轻松的路径
你倾向于在没必要的地方也设置难度,以证明自己能扛
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会接受不需要那么难,有时候轻松的进步也是真的进步。

textEn.oneliner: You grow stronger through hardship — difficulty shapes you rather than blocks you.
gifts: You stay steady under sustained pressure; the harder it gets, the longer you persist
You don't work on inspiration — you work on discipline, which outlasts inspiration
You convert "must do" into "I choose to do" — that's why you don't get crushed
shadows: You equate suffering with growth and miss easier paths
You add difficulty where it isn't needed, just to prove you can carry it
textEn.evolutionPath: Accept that it doesn't have to be that hard — sometimes effortless progress is real progress too.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在最艰难的时段坚持,沉默和黑暗里你反而清晰。
gifts: 你能独自度过没人看见的长夜,不需要鼓掌也能继续做
你对孤独有一种安然,别人不舒服的时刻反而是你工作的时刻
你的可靠性来自一个人的时刻也不偷懒
shadows: 你容易把「独自承担」当成美德,反而错过了可以分担的人
你倾向于不让别人看见你的辛苦,长期下来累积负重
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会让一两个人进入你的长夜,你的坚持不必证明给自己看。

textEn.oneliner: You persist through the hardest stretches — silence and darkness give you clarity.
gifts: You can walk through long nights no one sees, without needing applause to continue
You have an ease with solitude — others' uncomfortable hours are when you do your work
Your reliability comes from not slacking even when alone
shadows: You treat "carrying it alone" as virtue and miss the people willing to share the load
You hide your effort, accumulating weight that nobody knows about
textEn.evolutionPath: Let one or two people into your long nights — your endurance doesn't need to prove itself to you.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长在闪电瞬间看见全图,真相对你常常是突然降临的。
gifts: 你能在很短的时间里整合大量信息,得出别人需要几周的结论
你的洞察不是渐进的,是飞跃式的,常常让自己也吓一跳
你不害怕颠覆既有认知,新真相比旧舒适更有吸引力
shadows: 你容易让身边的人跟不上你的节奏,过于跳跃反而显得难懂
你倾向于在洞察之后不解释过程,只给结论让别人困惑
textZh.evolutionPath: 练习把跳跃的洞察拆解成步骤,启示需要被翻译别人才能用。

textEn.oneliner: You see the whole picture in a flash — truth often arrives suddenly for you.
gifts: You synthesize massive information in short time, reaching conclusions others take weeks to draw
Your insight isn't incremental — it's a leap, often surprising you too
You're not afraid to overturn established understanding; new truth pulls harder than old comfort
shadows: You leave others unable to follow your pace — too much leaping seems incomprehensible
You skip explaining the process after the insight, giving only conclusions
textEn.evolutionPath: Break leaps into steps — revelation needs translation before others can use it.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长把走丢的东西叫回来,无论是别人遗忘的天赋,还是自己曾经的部分。
gifts: 你能感知到别人哪里「丢了一块」,并帮他重新连接
你对历史和遗忘特别敏感,能记得别人都不记得的细节
你愿意进入别人不敢去的内在空间,把藏在那里的部分带回来
shadows: 你容易承担起别人的疗愈责任,自己却没人来叫回来
你倾向于沉浸在过去里,忘了当下也需要你
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会也把自己叫回来,你的过去需要被你自己重新认领,不只是被你救别人时连带处理。

textEn.oneliner: You call back what's been lost — others' forgotten gifts, or parts of yourself.
gifts: You sense where someone has "lost a piece" and help them reconnect
You're sensitive to history and forgetting; you remember details others don't
You enter inner spaces others fear and bring back what was hidden there
shadows: You take on others' healing responsibility while no one calls you back
You sink into the past and forget the present needs you too
textEn.evolutionPath: Call yourself back too — your past needs your own reclaiming, not just byproduct of saving others.

trademark.notes: 中文「招魂」在道教民俗有特定含义,需 UI 文案弱化传统语义,强调「召回自己」

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长深入挖掘,看似贫瘠的地方也能找到隐藏的资源。
gifts: 你愿意在同一个问题上待得比所有人都久,直到把它彻底想透
你能在别人放弃的地方发现真正的金子
你的专注力是稀有资源,能让平凡的事变得不平凡
shadows: 你容易陷在一个深井里太久,看不见地面上的其他可能
你倾向于忽略机会成本,有时候挪到下一个井反而更有效
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会判断什么时候该挖到底,什么时候该换个地方,深度需要配合方向。

textEn.oneliner: You dig deep — even seemingly barren ground yields hidden resources to you.
gifts: You stay with one problem longer than anyone else, until you've fully understood it
You find real gold where others gave up
Your focus is a rare resource that elevates ordinary work into something unusual
shadows: You stay in one well too long and miss surface possibilities elsewhere
You ignore opportunity cost — sometimes the next well is more productive
textEn.evolutionPath: Learn when to keep digging and when to relocate — depth needs direction to be useful.

textZh.oneliner: 你擅长陪人度过艰难的过渡期,你是别人转变中的稳定锚点。
gifts: 你能陪人走过他自己也走不通的那段
在告别的场合,你是最后一个还在说话的
你知道有些陪伴只能一程,然后必须放手让对方继续
shadows: 你容易把别人的过渡当成自己的目的地,忘了你也需要靠岸
你倾向于通过被需要建立价值感,反而怕被真正爱
textZh.evolutionPath: 学会也让别人渡你一程,你不必永远是那条接送别人的船。

textEn.oneliner: You accompany people through hard transitions — you're the steady anchor in others' change.
gifts: You walk people through the parts they can't walk alone
In goodbyes, you are the last voice still speaking
You know some companions are only for one stretch, then must be released
shadows: You mistake their crossing for your destination — and forget to step ashore
Used to being needed, you grow afraid of being loved
textEn.evolutionPath: Let yourself be ferried too — you don't have to be the boat forever.
